faqs.answer: Use Lucky Charm, Steel Shell, and Speed Potion after the route is learned, not before. Recipes are most valuable during rare checks, boss rooms, unlock attempts, or farming loops where you can use most of the buff duration.

faqs.question: What is the most common mistake in Ultimate Endgame Build Compilation?
faqs.answer: The most common mistake is rushing into the target route without matching team role, habitat condition, and recipe timing. Fix the route first, then spend resources.
